title: Happy Ghast Squint

texture redesign for the happy ghast

enjoy
body:
![ghast!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ec1ae6be2c2f5a4644e0422d6052757aee15400.png)


## **** Happy Ghast Face Texture

Enhances the Happy Ghast with a detailed, squinting smile for a cleaner, more polished, and expressive appearance. This pack focuses solely on the face, keeping the original body textures completely untouched and faithful to the default Minecraft 1.21.6 design.


![ghast!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ea76a75ab3bb34863409740aea1be5c8acc5f0a_0.webp)
